Claude Digest

Saturday, March 22, 2026
Automated via Claude Code
Signal
4 / 5
01

Claude Code

v2.1.72 → v2.1.81
v2.1.81 Mar 21 --bare flag for scripted/automated calls; --channels for permission relay; OAuth & voice mode fixes
v2.1.80 Mar 20 Rate limit display in status scripts; inline plugin declarations; MCP message push via --channels
v2.1.79 Mar 19 --console flag for Anthropic Console auth; session duration visibility; VSCode auto-titling
v2.1.78 Mar 18 StopFailure hooks; persistent plugin storage; tmux terminal popup; sandbox security fix
v2.1.77 Mar 17 Opus 4.6 output bumped to 64k default / 128k max; allowRead sandbox setting; /copy indexing
v2.1.76 Mar 14 MCP elicitation support (interactive input dialogs); session naming; sparse worktree paths
v2.1.75 Mar 13 Opus 4.6 context expanded to 1M tokens across all plans; /color command; memory timestamps
v2.1.72 Mar 10 Custom model mapping via modelOverrides; bundle size reduced ~510 KB
02

Anthropic Official

Voice Mode
Push-to-Talk Arrives
Rolling out to all users via /voice. Hold spacebar to speak, release to send. Works across every plan.
Models & API
Opus 4.6 Default Everywhere
Now default on Bedrock, Vertex, and Microsoft Foundry. New Sonnet (Mar 5) brings frontier coding & agent performance.
Anthropic Institute
New Research Arm
Led by Jack Clark. Three teams: Frontier Red Team, Societal Impacts, Economic Research. Focus on real-world AI impact.
Ecosystem
$100M Partner Network
Investment into the partner ecosystem announced Mar 12. March promotion boosts rate limits across all tiers.
03

GitHub Picks

7 repos
github/github-mcp-server
79k+ Easy
GitHub's official MCP server — manage repos, PRs, issues via natural language.
New Projects tools and OAuth scope filtering make this indispensable.
steipete/claude-code-mcp
~2k Medium
Runs Claude Code in one-shot MCP server mode — agent-in-your-agent.
Auto-bypasses permissions for scripted flows. Perfect for orchestration.
e2b-dev/mcp-server
~1k Medium
Secure remote code execution in E2B sandboxes via MCP.
Run untrusted agent-generated code safely without risking your own system.
cyanheads/git-mcp-server
~500 Easy
Comprehensive Git operations via MCP — clone, commit, rebase, worktrees.
Full Git coverage without the overhead of GitHub's server. STDIO & HTTP.
grahama1970/claude-code-mcp-enhanced
Advanced
Enhanced Claude Code MCP with orchestration and reliability improvements.
Self-contained execution patterns for complex multi-step agent workflows.
ccbikai/github-stars
~800 Easy
Cloudflare-powered MCP to search GitHub starred repos with natural language.
Finally makes your star archive useful instead of a graveyard.
tolkonepiu/best-of-mcp-servers
Easy
Weekly-updated ranked list of top MCP servers.
Best single reference for MCP server discovery in the growing ecosystem.
04

Community & Research

📚 HuggingFace
Auditing Language Models for Hidden Objectives
New Anthropic paper — methods for detecting latent goals in LLMs that weren't specified during training. Significant alignment research. Read PDF →
💬 Reddit r/ClaudeAI · 612k members
Claude Code vs Codex ▲ top thread
Community verdict: Claude Code wins quality (67% in blind tests) but rate limits make it impractical as daily driver. Codex rated more usable in practice.
Mar 2 Global Outage ▲ 800+
Claude.ai went down across web, mobile, and API — traced to auth/login flow bug. Thread became real-time incident tracker.
🐦 X / Twitter
Anthropic Institute Launch
@AnthropicAI — Drove major engagement. Focus on AI's economic impact on jobs and the broader economy.
Time Magazine Cover Story
"How Anthropic Became the Most Disruptive Company in the World" — widely shared by AI researchers and commentators.
05

Tip of the Day

Actionable
Use the new --bare flag in Claude Code for scripted pipelines:
claude --bare --print "refactor this function" < myfile.py
--bare suppresses all UI chrome and outputs only the response — perfect for piping into other tools or CI scripts. Pair with --channels to handle permission prompts programmatically.
Daily Claude Digest · Automated via Claude Code
Active release week — solid signal across all channels.
